title: Gonocormus matthewii
taxonomy: Gonocormus matthewii is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Gonocormus and is a type of shrub native to the Western Ghats in India. The classification of Gonocormus matthewii is as follows: kingdom - Plantae, clade - Angiosperms, clade - Eudicots, clade - Asterids, and order - Gentianales. Within the family Rubiaceae, it is part of the subfamily Rubioideae. Further classification includes the tribe - Rubieae, and the genus - Gonocormus.
